Hospitality

ANA Restaurant

2024
Client ANA Restaurant
Region Dubai Mall
Year 2024
Sector Hospitality

Concept & Interior Design, Brand Experience, Customer Journey, Menu & Experience Design

Designing Identity into Dining

ANA was conceived as a living cultural canvas, reflecting the UAE’s diversity and Emirati hospitality. The façade features a “no-logo logo” wall, where every version of “ANA / أنا” represents a different personality and identity. This symbolism mirrors the UAE as a melting pot of cultures, translated into Emirati-fusion cuisine, interior design, and a holistic guest experience. The design balances contemporary Arabesque aesthetics with modern luxury — refined materials, warm tones, and bold art statements. From dining areas to the majlis event zone, every detail reinforces ANA’s philosophy of celebrating individuality through shared experience.
